betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Chunk Pregenerator§f

§aSeamless world exploration begins here!§f
Normally, generating new chunks on-the-fly while running or flying at high speeds causes major stuttering and frame drops. §9Chunk Pregenerator§f allows you to generate your world preemptively, ensuring perfectly smooth exploration.

§6Player Benefits & Features§f:
§b• Preemptive World Generation§f: By rendering chunks ahead of time, your system only has to load pre-existing files while you travel, completely eliminating chunk-generation lag.
§b• Background Generation§f: World generation is offloaded to background threads. This allows you to safely trigger generation and keep playing the game without impacting your active gameplay.
§b• Live World Profiler§f: Access an in-game UI-based profiler to see live stats of your world, including active block updates, block ticks, and active ticking entities or machines. Extremely useful for identifying what is causing lag at your base.
§b• Optional UI Interface§f: Rather than typing complex console commands, you can manage and track generation tasks through a friendly graphical interface.

§eTip§f: Run a pregeneration task around your base region and along your planned travel routes so you can fly and explore at extreme speeds without a single hiccup.
